form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[合同编号] contractName[合同名称] contractType[合同类型] contractDirection[合同方向] orgId[业务组织] status[合同状态] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>parties[合同方信息]====== partnerId[合作方] parentContractId[父合同] templateId[合同模板] ==========>finance[财务信息]====== currencyId[币种] totalAmount[合同总额] ==========>schedule[日期信息]====== startDate[生效日期] endDate[到期日期] signDate[签署日期] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= description[描述] attachmentFileId[合同附件] remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[合同编号] contractName[合同名称] contractType[合同类型] contractDirection[合同方向] orgId[业务组织] status[合同状态] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>parties[合同方信息]====== partnerId[合作方] parentContractId[父合同] templateId[合同模板] ==========>finance[财务信息]====== currencyId[币种] totalAmount[合同总额] ==========>schedule[日期信息]====== startDate[生效日期] endDate[到期日期] signDate[签署日期] description[描述](2)

form.title: 查询条件
